comment: F27 P9 T2 — acceptance floors RECALIBRATED against the n=6 gold corpus after T2 Architect+Editor prompt tuning + chronic-density budget bump (ArchitectMaxOutputTokens 65536 -> 96000, EditorMaxOutputTokens 16384 -> 32000). T2 lifts macro_recall 0.391 -> 0.577 (+47%% relative) and macro_precision_highest 0.451 -> 0.502 (+11%%). The lift is two-headed: (1) prompt tuning — GRANULARITY RULE + ANTI-QUOTA GUARD + PR-TYPE CATEGORY HEURISTIC + CATEGORY PRECEDENCE + CONTRACT-BEARING COMMENTS on Architect; STRICT 1:1 SKETCH-TO-SCENARIO MAPPING + ARCHITECT-LABEL PRESERVATION + CATEGORY SELECTION GUIDE on Editor — drove PR-966141 (tiny error-classification refactor) from 0.000 -> 0.750 (Editor now matches the curator's per-contract granularity) and PR-960543 (dense 17-file error-code migration) from 0.182 -> 0.364. (2) budget bump — both PR-975848 and PR-977882 chronically exhausted the 65K Architect budget under T2's longer prompts (status=incomplete, 0 output tokens after ~250s of reasoning). 96000 carries headroom for dense PRs AND for the T3 FLT-priors prefix block (~5K tokens). EditorMaxOutputTokens lifted to 32000 to accommodate 10-sketch dense scenarios. Per-PR: PR-955910 0.333, PR-960543 0.364, PR-966141 0.750, PR-975848 0.750 (flat from T1k), PR-976609 0.667 (flat from T1k), PR-977882 0.600. NOTE: PR-977882 capture is variance-prone at 96K (one ARCHITECT_FAILED in 2 attempts before succeeding); if a future capture pass shows >25%% architect-failure rate consider bumping to 128K. T2.1 hotfix attempt (PARALLEL-SIBLING COMPRESSION + 4th Regression trigger) was REVERTED in-session — it over-compressed diverse-touchpoint PRs (PR-976609 9 sketches -> 4, broke 0.667 baseline to 0.333). Lesson: structural procedural rules in prompts can't reliably distinguish 'siblings that revert together' from 'distinct scenarios that share evidence shape'. The argument for T3 (descriptive FLT priors > prescriptive prompt rules). Floors lifted to ~78%% of T2 measured baseline (corpus 0.45/0.39/0.45 vs measured 0.577/0.502/0.577) AND strictly above T1k floors (0.30/0.35/0.30) so a silent prompt revert OR a scorer regression trips the gate, AND strictly below new T2 baseline so LLM nondeterminism flap stays under the gate. Per-PR floors remain at 0.0 with documented rationale (PR-955910 at 0.333 / PR-960543 at 0.364 — a per-PR ratchet would block honest captures). Re-introduce per-PR floors after T3 stabilises the corpus floor across PR shapes. EdogQaLlmClient.cs Architect + Editor prompts changed; ArchitectMaxOutputTokens 65536 -> 96000, EditorMaxOutputTokens 16384 -> 32000; cache keys still at v2 (T2 prompt set is byte-distinct from T1g but the cache key was bumped at the T2 boundary and remains stable through T2.1 revert). Spec's nominal 0.80 recall / 0.90 precision remains the destination. enforcement: report_only until corpus crosses 0.70 macro recall (T3+).
